name: asuer-plugins
description: Asuer & BBB internal Claude Code plugins — branded document generation and internal tooling.

plugins.name: asuer-pdf
plugins.description: Create Asuer-branded PDF documents — policy/legal, business letter, internal memo, meeting agenda/minutes, specification/report — from HTML, rendered to A4 with the Asuer letterhead, Poppins, brand blue and a repeating branded footer. Cover and no-cover variants of every type.

plugins.name: ict-ticket
plugins.description: Drive the internal ICT ticket Jotform end-to-end via Playwright MCP. Asks clarifying questions, shows a preview, fills the form across all 4 pages, and pauses for explicit confirmation before submission.
